signals.idea: Investigate why locking the generation pane at the bottom in tools/video-editor doesn't compress the editor to minimum space. The editor should shift up and take minimum space when the bottom pane is locked, similar to pressing the compressed button below the video. Trace the pane locking mechanism, bottom pane offset/height calculation, video editor layout response to locked bottom pane, and identify what's preventing compression.

unresolved_flags.concern: Over-engineering: the plan adds a new calc-based height system in both `LayoutMainContent` and `Layout`, even though this layout already has a centralized bottom-offset path.
Step 3 targets the wrong layer: shrinking `Layout.tsx`'s outer wrapper is not what controls overlap with the generations pane.
The plan's suggestion to fall back to `generationsPaneHeight` as a simpler approximation is incorrect and can reintroduce overlap on constrained viewports.
The validation section only reruns existing tests, but the current suite does not cover the video-editor shell branch that the fix depends on.

signals.loop_summary: Iteration 1. Weighted score trajectory: 6.25. Plan deltas: n/a. Recurring critiques: 0. Resolved flags: 0. Open significant flags: 4.

items: Locking the generations pane while on `/tools/video-editor?timeline=...` causes the full editor to shrink vertically, with the timeline and preview compressing to fit above the generations pane.
Unlocking the generations pane restores the editor to full viewport height.
The compression/expansion transition is smooth (300ms ease-smooth).
The compact editor pane (top) continues to work correctly — no regression.
No z-index or overlap issues between the video editor and the generations pane.

unresolved_flags.concern: Over-engineering: the plan adds a new calc-based height system in both `LayoutMainContent` and `Layout`, even though this layout already has a centralized bottom-offset path.
unresolved_flags.evidence: `LayoutMainContent` already computes pane offsets in one place at `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx:37-41`, and its editor-shell `<main>` already uses `h-full` at `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx:73-78`. The editor-specific breakage is that the video-editor branch forces `paddingBottom: '0px'` at `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx:41`, while `VideoEditorPage` still hard-codes `h-screen` at `src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx:292`. That points to a smaller fix than introducing height math in two layout layers.

unresolved_flags.concern: Step 3 targets the wrong layer: shrinking `Layout.tsx`'s outer wrapper is not what controls overlap with the generations pane.
unresolved_flags.evidence: The generations surface is a fixed sibling rendered with `fixed bottom-0` in `src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/GenerationsPane.tsx:96-107`. `Layout.tsx`'s wrapper at `src/app/Layout.tsx:112` only wraps route content plus sibling panes; changing that wrapper height does not reposition the fixed pane, and risks clipping unrelated full-height children. The actual route content that ignores the bottom reservation is `paddingBottom: '0px'` in `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx:41` plus the `h-screen` root in `src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx:292`.

unresolved_flags.concern: The plan's suggestion to fall back to `generationsPaneHeight` as a simpler approximation is incorrect and can reintroduce overlap on constrained viewports.
unresolved_flags.evidence: `PanesContext` computes `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight` specifically so the editor and generations pane fit within the viewport at `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx:87-120`, and exposes that value at `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx:166-170`. The pane itself renders using `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight` at `src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/GenerationsPane.tsx:94-107`. Reserving space with raw `generationsPaneHeight` would desync the editor's reserved area from the pane's actual rendered height.

unresolved_flags.concern: The validation section only reruns existing tests, but the current suite does not cover the video-editor shell branch that the fix depends on.
unresolved_flags.evidence: `LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` defaults `isVideoEditorShellActive` to `false` at `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx:76-79`, and every test in that file exercises only the non-editor branch. None assert the video-editor path at `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx:41,65-76`. The plan should add a regression test for a locked generations pane on the `/tools/video-editor?timeline=...` layout rather than only rerunning current tests.
